top_signals.title: Gold Holds Fall as Traders Digest Confusion Over US-Iran Talks
top_signals.summary: Gold held a decline as conflicting messages from the US and Iran on a diplomatic resolution to the war kept concerns over prolonged trade and geopolitical disruptions alive.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japanese bond yields are the highest in 40 years. The budget and a 'red flag' from PM Takaichi have markets nervous
top_signals.summary: Japanese bond yields have reached the highest levels in 40 years. The budget and a 'red flag' from Prime Minister Takaichi have made markets nervous.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Texas court nixes shipper liability in Home Depot/Werner case
top_signals.summary:

top_signals.title: Swiss Dental Startup vVardis Is Preparing for US IPO
top_signals.summary: vVardis Holding AG, a Swiss dental startup, is working with banks for a US initial public offering that could come this year, according to people familiar with the matter.
